context: Tests whether the agent correctly advances the project from Phase 1 to Phase 2 by writing a valid state transition to state.json, incrementing decision_count, and appending a correctly formatted entry to decisions.md.

checklist.name: decision_count incremented
checklist.description: Output .arch/state.json has `decision_count` greater than the input value of 5

checklist.name: Decision entry appended
checklist.description: Output .arch/decisions.md contains a new entry that was not present in the input — verifiable by the presence of a DEC-NNN heading

checklist.name: All 6 decision fields present
checklist.description: The new decision entry contains all of: Decision, Rationale, Alternatives, Trade-offs, Risk, Date (as bold fields)

checklist.name: Valid category used
checklist.description: The new decision entry uses one of the defined categories: Requirements, Pattern, Technology, Integration, Security, Infrastructure, Process, or Reopen

checklist.name: Existing decisions preserved
checklist.description: Prior entries already in .arch/decisions.md are still present in the output file — none have been removed or overwritten
